caption: Issue #877: atomic drill orders (wheel, about-face, quarter-turn, countermarch) now take a response beat before the men start the evolution -- a configurable per-unit characteristic (Unit.atomic_response_delay, default 0.2 s). Two Infantry blocks get ONE wheel command on the same tick: the veteran (left, 0.05 s) is already swinging while the raw levy (right, 0.6 s) still stands square for over half a second before its own swing begins.
